title: kb.plan.archived v1
description: Emitted by kb watch (src/commands/watch.rs:914) when it auto-archives a category:plan vault entry whose linked hearth-loom bead/trace has completed (merge). Source: /kb.

entry_id.description: Archived plan entry's id. Defaults to empty string if unavailable, rather than being omitted.

title.description: Plan entry title. Defaults to empty string if unavailable.

trace_uri.description: Trace URI (e.g. bd://<bead>) that linked this plan to the completed work.

reason.description: Reason for the auto-archive. Currently always the literal 'anchor bead merged' at this call site, kept as a free-form string rather than a schema enum since it isn't a real Rust enum.
